message:
fix(core): guard against zero-length LZO segments and remove stale doc comment

Add seg_len == 0 guard in btrfs LZO decompression loop to prevent
infinite loops on malformed compressed data where a segment header
claims zero bytes. Remove orphaned doc comment before impl OpenFs
block that was left from a prior refactor.

Update beads issue tracker with new issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
